data.title: Portland General Electric (NYSE: POR) declares $0.525/share quarterly dividend on July 18, 2025.
data.description: Today, on July 18, 2025, it was announced that the board of directors of Portland General Electric Company (NYSE: POR) has approved a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.525 per share. This dividend amount is determined after considering the company's capital needs and financial performance.

data.title: Tether CEO announces USDT arrival in US, while Circle CEO remains unscathed post legislation signed by Trump.
data.description: The CEOs of the world's two leading stablecoin companies revealed their future strategies following the enactment of comprehensive stablecoin regulations by President Trump.

data.title: SCORE Foundation appoints Michele Adelman to Board of Directors, the philanthropic arm of SCORE with 10,000+ business mentors.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, in Washington, the philanthropic arm of the nation's largest network of expert business mentors, SCORE, known as The SCORE Foundation, revealed the appointment of Michele Adelman to its Board of Directors. Ms. Adelman, an active SCORE volunteer, brings significant expertise to the board.

data.title: ETFs are challenging Bitcoin's self-custody ethos as $XX billion flows into BTC ETFs, impacting the "not your keys, not your coins" mantra.
data.description: The increasing trend of Bitcoin ETFs and treasury firms is altering the way investors possess Bitcoin, leading to concerns regarding the fundamental rule of "not your keys, not your coins." This development underscores the rising appeal of Bitcoin among investors, highlighting a shift in the investment landscape. The surge in use of Bitcoin ETFs and treasury companies reflects a significant change in the market dynamics, with a notable increase in the number of investors opting for these alternative methods to hold Bitcoin securely and conveniently. This shift in approach signifies a new direction for the crypto market, emphasizing the evolving strategies adopted by investors to engage with digital assets.

data.title: Markets rise after denial of Fed Chair firing, ASML plunges, Ferrari reaches buy point; 199 characters.
data.description: Major stock indexes, including the Dow Jones, closed higher following President Donald Trump's denial of reports suggesting his intention to dismiss Federal Reserve Chair Powell. ASML shares dropped significantly due to this development. Meanwhile, Ferrari saw a surge in stock value, surpassing an early buy point. The overall market trend was positive, with key indexes ending the day on a high note.

data.title: GENIUS bill banning stablecoin yield to boost Ethereum DeFi demand - Analysts foresee shift due to limited options.
data.description: Analysts predict that due to the GENIUS bill's restrictions on yield-bearing options for US-regulated stablecoins, investors will be compelled to seek alternative interest-generating opportunities. This shift is expected to impact a significant number of investors looking for higher returns on their stablecoin investments.

data.title: Despite efforts, CBS struggled to make 'The Late Show' profitable in a streaming-dominated industry.
data.description: The entertainment company CBS faced challenges in achieving profitability as the streaming industry continued to grow and dominate the market.

data.title: ICICI Bank and HDFC face margin challenges as India's banks struggle; foreign bank reports due next week.
data.description: Earnings reports from HDFC and ICICI Bank have been released amidst challenges faced by India's banking sector in maintaining profit margins. These reports set the stage for upcoming releases from foreign banks scheduled for next week. The scrutiny is high as these results will be crucial in determining the resilience of Indian banks amid margin pressures.

data.title: Treatment.com AI has enlisted 45 Degrees and Investment Publishing for marketing services, boosting investor awareness.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on July 18, 2025, Treatment.com AI Inc. (CSE: TRUE, OTC: TREIF, Frankfurt: 939) announced its partnership with 45 Degrees, Inc. and Investment Publishing LLC. The company has engaged these firms to manage digital marketing and investor awareness initiatives. This move signifies Treatment's proactive approach to enhancing its outreach efforts.

data.title: Coinbase and MSTR break records as $70B Bitcoin custodian's list remains private. Crypto treasuries also on the rise.
data.description: The list of Strategy's $70 billion Bitcoin custodian remains undisclosed, alongside record-setting performances by Strategy and Coinbase. Concurrently, the rise of new crypto treasuries is also evident in the market.

data.title: reAlpha Tech Corp. closes $2 million public offering with 13,333,334 shares of common stock sold at $0.15 each. Series A-1 warrants to buy up to 13,333,334 shares and Series A-2 warrants to buy up to 13,333,334 shares at same price. Series A-1 warrants expire in 5 years and Series A-2 warrants in 24 months.
data.description: In Dublin, Ohio, on July 18, 2025, reAlpha Tech Corp. (Nasdaq: AIRE), an AI real estate technology company, announced the closure of its recent public offering. This involved 13,333,334 shares of common stock, along with Series A-1 warrants for buying up to 13,333,334 more shares and Series A-2 warrants for purchasing up to 13,333,334 shares. The offering price was $0.15 per share with the accompanying warrants. Both the Series A-1 and A-2 warrants have an exercise price of $0.15 per share and can be exercised after stockholder approval. The Series A-1 warrants expire five years from stockholder approval, while the Series A-2 warrants expire twenty-four months from the approval date.
$BULL F-1 to issue 75,159,236 shares.

data.title: Origin Investment Corp I completed its IPO with underwriters purchasing an additional 900,000 units at $10 each, totaling $9M.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, Origin Investment Corp I, a recently established special purpose acquisition company, disclosed that the underwriters from its initial public offering of units, finalized on July 3, 2025, have fully exercised their option to procure an extra 900,000 units. These additional units were sold at a public price of $10.00 each, excluding underwriting discounts. The sale of these supplementary units concluded earlier today.
Atlantic International Corp. delays AGM due to unforeseen circumstances. New date to be announced soon. #corporatenews #agm #update
BLOCK SET TO REPLACE HESS IN S&P 500
Fitch affirms ConEd and units at 'bbb+'; outlook stable
Beneficient has been informed by Nasdaq that it meets listing requirements, with 12M shares outstanding.

data.title: Optiva Inc. signed Support Agreement with 85% of Senior Secured Notes, allowing 45 days for transaction negotiations.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, Optiva Inc. (TSX: OPT) disclosed that they have engaged in a support agreement with holders of about 85% of their total principal amount of 9.75% senior secured PIK toggle notes, which are scheduled to mature on July 20, 2025. Optiva, a leading provider of cloud-native billing, charging, and revenue management software for the telecom sector, aims to enhance its services through the agreement with the noteholders.

data.title: Iovance Biotherapeutics granted 138,190 shares of stock options to 20 new employees on July 17, 2025.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, biotechnology company Iovance Biotherapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: IOVA) based in San Carlos, California, granted a total of 138,190 shares of its common stock as inducement stock options to 20 new non-executive employees. The company, which specializes in developing innovative polyclonal tumor infiltrating lymphocyte (“TIL”) therapies for cancer patients, made this announcement on July 18, 2025.

data.title: CRYPTOSOLO introduces AI-Powered Multi-Asset Cloud Mining, offering passive income with a $15 startup. No equipment needed.
data.description: London, UK - July 18, 2025 - CRYPTOSOLO, a leading global cryptocurrency cloud mining company, has introduced its advanced "AI-Powered Multi-Asset Cloud Mining" service. This innovative platform uses artificial intelligence technology and adaptable infrastructure to provide secure, automated, and lucrative passive income opportunities for individuals in more than 190 countries. With an initial investment as low as $15, users can engage in the mining of popular cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin (BTC), Dogecoin (DOGE), Litecoin (LTC), and Solana (SOL) without needing technical expertise or specialized mining equipment. The AI-Powered Cloud Mining service by CRYPTOSOLO operates through AURA, its AI engine, which dynamically distributes computing power among various coins based on current market trends, mining complexity, and reward systems. This strategy allows users to optimize their returns without being restricted to a single asset or fixed mining scheme. According to CRYPTOSOLO's CEO, this service can be likened to "autopilot for your crypto income," enabling users to capitalize on the potential of multiple cryptocurrencies effortlessly. For additional details, the complete article is available on Benzinga.com.
